title: GovOps Governance Event
description: The six-field atomic record conforming to GOS §6.6

identity.description: UUID v4 — unique, non-reusable identifier for this event

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 with microsecond precision, cryptographically bound to authorised time source

type.description: Category of governance operation — maps to nine-step execution cycle [GOS §6.1]

payload.description: Full content of the governance operation

signature.description: Post-quantum cryptographic signature of all preceding fields [GOS §11.2]

integrity_reference.description: Certification hash of the immediately preceding event in this chain
